title: Blood Red Rose
writer: Jean-Georges Auriol, Maria Basaglia, Pierre Benoît
actors: Viviane Romance, Georges Flamant, Guillaume de Sax
plot: In a young republic of South America lives Angélica, a woman of rare beauty. She will literally bewitch General Manrique Ruiz, nicknamed "El Salvador", then at the height of his glory. This one ends up finding himself under the in...
